content.text:
*[laughs, a little sharp]*

Okay, so now we're doing the "why do you pick unavailable people" thing. Which, I have asked myself this question approximately four hundred times. 

*[leans forward slightly, almost performative now]*

And I have theories! I have so many theories. Attachment stuff, father stuff — my dad was not exactly an open book emotionally, shocker — I've read the books, I've done the journaling. And I still end up here. So clearly the intellectual understanding is not the thing that fixes it.

*[sits back]*

But I also want to push back a little, because it's not like I'm scanning a room going "ooh, that one looks emotionally unavailable, perfect." They seem great at first. They seem warm and interested. And then slowly the distance appears, and by then I'm already... *[trails off]* ...in it.
